_comment: Example StatefulSet template payload.  Consumed by the example-template generator and the docs/--show-example surface.  The StatefulSet is constructed programmatically by orb.providers.k8s.utilities.statefulset_spec.build_statefulset_spec; this JSON only captures the per-template ORB-level fields.
name: Kubernetes StatefulSet example
description: Submit a StatefulSet-managed pod set via the kubernetes provider.
